description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a striking black and orange sunburst pattern across its wings and fuselage. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration, with straight wings extending horizontally from the lower part of the fuselage. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tailwheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests an aerobatic or sport aircraft.
description: A small, low-wing, single-propeller airplane with a vivid black and orange sunburst pattern and a conventional tail. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and fixed taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full sunburst pattern on the wings and fuselage, with the propeller and cockpit clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight wings, tail section, and the symmetry of the sunburst design across the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down view, mirroring view 0, with the tail and propeller both visible and the landing gear partially seen.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the propeller, nose, cockpit canopy, and the full span of the wings with their bold pattern.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; distinctive sunburst pattern.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for one or two seats, with a clear canopy.
